string.name: unavailable_missing_install_to_use
string.description: Shown when target app is not installed; offers Play Store install

string.name: unavailable_not_applicable
string.description: Shown when device cannot perform action (no SIM, no telephony, no browser)

string.name: unavailable_unknown_in_version
string.description: Shown when config references provider that this app version does not know yet

resources.string: Эта функция недоступна в твоей версии приложения

string.name: dispatch_failure_snackbar
string.description: Generic snackbar text after action failed; keep neutral, no blame

string.name: dispatch_failure_retry_action
string.description: Snackbar action button to retry the dispatch
